settings.title: Roller Blinds
settings.subtitle: Measuring Guide
settings.description: Accurate measurements are essential for a perfect fit. Follow our step-by-step guide to measure your windows with confidence.

settings.title: Wooden Blinds

settings.description: Accurate measurements are essential for a perfect fit. Follow our step-by-step guide to measure your windows with confidence.

settings.title: Vertical Blinds
settings.subtitle: Measuring Guide
settings.description: Accurate measurements are essential for a perfect fit. Follow our step-by-step guide to measure your windows with confidence.

settings.title: Metal Tape Only
settings.text: Always use a metal measuring tape and record your measurements in mm, cm, and ft.

settings.title: Accuracy Counts
settings.text: Precise measurements are essential for a perfect fit. We'll make the necessary allowances.

settings.title: Fitting Style
settings.text: Select Inside Recess for fitting within the frame, or Outside Recess Exact Size for outside mounting.

settings.title: What You'll Need
settings.subtitle: Just two simple tools to get started with measuring your windows.

settings.title: Inside Recess
settings.description: For blinds fitted within the window frame. Measure at the positions shown — horizontally and vertically — and record the smallest dimension as your recess size.
settings.checklist: Measure width at top, middle, and bottom of the recess | Measure drop at left, middle, and right | Use the smallest measurement — we'll make allowances for a perfect fit

settings.title: Outside Recess
settings.description: For blinds fitted outside the window frame for better coverage. Take your inside recess measurement and add 100mm overlap on each side.
settings.checklist: Add 100mm (10cm) to both width and drop measurements | Select "Outside Recess" as your fitting type when ordering | Ensures full window coverage with no light gaps

settings.title: How to Measure
settings.subtitle: Choose your fitting type and follow the guide below.

settings.title: Keep Out of Reach
settings.description: Keep all cords and chains out of the reach of children at all times.

settings.title: Use Safety Devices
settings.description: Use the provided safety hook to secure loose cords and chains safely.

settings.warning_points: Young children can be strangled by loops in pull cords, chains, tapes, and inner cords that operate the product. | To avoid strangulation and entanglement, keep cords out of the reach of young children. | Cords may become wrapped around a child's neck. Move beds, cots, and furniture away from window covering cords. | Do not tie cords together. Make sure cords do not twist and create a loop.

settings.title: Child Safety & Control Guidelines
settings.subtitle: Safety is our top priority. Please follow these guidelines.

settings.review_text: Excellent guides and easy to follow!
